question_text: How fairly do you feel you are paid relative to your contribution at the company?
How satisfied are you with the benefits package offered to you?
How well does your compensation reflect your level of experience and skills?
How effectively does your direct manager communicate expectations and priorities?
How supported do you feel by your manager in your professional development?
How comfortable are you raising concerns or disagreements with your manager?
How well does your team collaborate to achieve shared goals?
How valued and respected do you feel by your immediate colleagues?
How fairly is workload distributed within your team?
How would you rate the overall day-to-day atmosphere at work?
How well does the company promote diversity and inclusion?
How effectively does the company support your mental health and wellbeing?
How confident are you in your opportunities for career progression here?
How satisfied are you with the learning and development resources available?
How clearly has your potential career path been communicated to you?
How well does the company respect your personal time and boundaries?
How manageable is your current workload on a day-to-day basis?
How supported do you feel in working flexibly when you need to?
